# awscc_bedrockagentcore_payment_connector (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::BedrockAgentCore::PaymentConnector



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `connector_created_at` (String) The timestamp when the connector was created
- `connector_last_updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the connector was last updated
- `connector_name` (String) The name of the payment connector
- `connector_status` (String)
- `connector_type` (String)
- `credential_provider_configurations` (Attributes List) The credential provider configurations for the connector (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--credential_provider_configurations))
- `description` (String) A description of the payment connector
- `payment_connector_arn` (String) Synthetic ARN for the payment connector (used for engine resolution)
- `payment_connector_id` (String) The unique identifier for the payment connector
- `payment_manager_id` (String) The identifier of the parent payment manager

<a id="nestedatt--credential_provider_configurations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `credential_provider_configurations`

Read-Only:

- `coinbase_cdp` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--credential_provider_configurations--coinbase_cdp))
- `stripe_privy` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--credential_provider_configurations--stripe_privy))

<a id="nestedatt--credential_provider_configurations--coinbase_cdp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `credential_provider_configurations.coinbase_cdp`

Read-Only:

- `credential_provider_arn` (String) The ARN of the payment credential provider


<a id="nestedatt--credential_provider_configurations--stripe_privy"></a>
### Nested Schema for `credential_provider_configurations.stripe_privy`

Read-Only:

- `credential_provider_arn` (String) The ARN of the payment credential provider
